response.justification: While Maria brings 20+ years of solid software development experience and strong communication skills, she lacks the mandatory technical requirements for this role. Her C++ experience is minimal and dated (last substantive work in 2015), with no evidence of Windows platform expertise or SQL Server/Oracle specialization. More critically, she has no capital markets, fixed-income, or financial derivatives domain knowledge—her finance exposure (RIDE Capital) was web-based fintech, not trading systems. The role requires 5–10 years of active, deep C++ expertise paired with financial domain knowledge; this candidate's career has diverged into web/backend development and lacks both prerequisites.
strengths: Strong communicator with proven teaching ability across multiple workshops and courses
20+ years of senior-level software development across diverse platforms and technologies
Demonstrated CI/CD and DevOps expertise with experience managing infrastructure and automation
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (6–12 months circa 2015) and severely predates the job requirement of 5–10 years current, hands-on expertise
No Windows platform development background; career focused on Linux/Unix and web technologies
Zero financial services domain knowledge; recent finance role (RIDE Capital) was web-based fintech, not capital markets or fixed-income trading systems

key_factors.factor: Absence of recent, substantive C++ expertise
No capital markets or fixed-income domain experience
No Windows platform specialization; primarily Linux/web stack background
